entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the crop being studied for SCMR variation

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A major cause of yield losses in chickpea

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The final agricultural output of the crop

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits to reduce yield losses

entities.name: ANALYTICAL MODELS
entities.description: Tools used to understand the effects of parameters on final yield

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: A biological process and component of the yield function

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Crop biomass production per unit water transpired

entities.name: CROP BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The amount of biomass produced by the crop

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A component of the yield function

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READINGS
entities.description: A surrogate trait associated with transpiration efficiency and leaf chlorophyll

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop where the relationship between SCMR and TE was previously established

entities.name: LEAF CHLOROPHYLL
entities.description: A substance in leaves with a direct linear relationship to SCMR

entities.name: LEAF NITROGEN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: A chemical concentration in leaves related to SCMR

entities.name: SPAD METERS
entities.description: A nondestructive, lightweight tool used for rapid measurement of chlorophyll

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand drought, targeted for improvement in groundnut

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A manageable subset of germplasm representing the diversity of the whole collection

entities.description: The variation of traits within a germplasm collection
